message:
test(runtime): add 25 property-based tests for runtime module (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Cover ResizeWatchdogSeverity serde roundtrip and snake_case serialization,
RuntimeLockMemoryTelemetrySnapshot serde roundtrip with f64 tolerance and
percentile ordering (p50<=p95<=max), ResizeWatchdogAssessment serde
roundtrip and warning_line consistency (Healthy→None, non-Healthy→Some,
watchdog text), ResizeStalledTransaction and ResizeExecutionPhase serde,
and threshold ordering preservation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
